source_jobs.title: Senior Security Operations Center (SOC) Analyst, Hawaii
source_jobs.description:
About RapDev:

RapDev builds the operational backbone for autonomous IT. More than 1,000 enterprises run ServiceNow and Datadog better because of us — trusted data, connected workflows, and AI that resolves incidents instead of just reporting them.

On the ServiceNow side of our business, we specialize in modern ITOM, ITAM, AI, SPM, and DevOps implementations designed to help organizations engineer their ServiceNow into a powerful AI-driven platform. And on the Datadog side of our business, our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity for organizations looking to drive measurable business impact through their Datadog environment.

About the job

Are you a security professional looking for a Senior Security Operations Center role in IR?  We are the leading Datadog partner and are embarking on building a security managed services offering from the ground up. This is a unique opportunity to work with cutting edge cloud security solutions and be involved in major infrastructure migration projects.  



This position requires you to be based in Hawaii with the working hours of Monday - Friday, 4PM - 12am HST.



What you'll do:

 - Monitor security events and logs from a variety of systems and networks in Datadog

 - Identify potential security incidents and threats

 - Perform analysis and investigations, correlating events and data to detect security incidents

 - Develop, document, and evolve processes and procedures for responding to security incidents

 - Provide technical guidance, training, and support to other members of the security team

 - Maintain an up-to-date knowledge of security threats, vulnerabilities, and countermeasures

 - Work independently with customers on implementations and remote services

 - Troubleshoot basic configuration/script issues

 - Attend requirements review and validation sessions as needed

 - Utilize strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Stay on time and on task with assigned customer work

Who you are:

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Cyber Security or related field

 - SIEM experience with Splunk, SumoLogic, Datadog, or similar.

 - Experience with security monitoring, incident response, and threat analysis

 - Experience with Cloud Native Technologies

 - Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills

 - Knowledge of security best practices and standards

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 - Experience/willingness working on multiple projects simultaneously

 - Self-Learner and eager to understand new technologies

Compensation:

 - Base Salary: $110,000-$150,000 annually, depending on experience

Benefits

 - 100% Employee Healthcare Coverage (Medical, Dental & Vision)

 - Retirement Plan (5% 401k Match, IRA)

 - Unlimited Paid Time Off (4-week minimum) (Vacation, Sick & Public Holidays)

 - Family Leave (Maternity, Paternity)

 - Equity 

 - Hybrid Work Opportunities

 - Fitness & Commuter Subsidies available

 - SL & LT Disability

RapDev is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.

source_jobs.title: Senior ServiceNow Engineer, UK
source_jobs.description:
About RapDev:

RapDev builds the operational backbone for autonomous IT. More than 1,000 enterprises run ServiceNow and Datadog better because of us — trusted data, connected workflows, and AI that resolves incidents instead of just reporting them.

On the ServiceNow side of our business, we specialize in modern ITOM, ITAM, AI, SPM, and DevOps implementations designed to help organizations engineer their ServiceNow into a powerful AI-driven platform. And on the Datadog side of our business, our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity for organizations looking to drive measurable business impact through their Datadog environment.

About the job

Are you interested in solving complex problems for ServiceNow customers? We're the leading DevOps partner in the ServiceNow ecosystem and are looking for engineers that are ready to learn the latest technologies and integrate them with the ServiceNow platform. This is a unique opportunity to work with the ServiceNow platform while still learning AWS, GCP, Azure along with Jenkins, Github, QA tools, and more!



This role requires you to be based in the UK.



What you'll do:

 - Develop quality software and web applications

 - Analyze and maintain existing software applications

 - Design highly scalable, testable code

 - Discover and fix programming bugs

 - 3rd party integration development (REST, SOAP, mid servers, etc)

 - Write/create custom business rules, client scripts, script includes, UI policies, ACL’s, UI scripts

 - Work independently with customers on implementations and remote services

 - Troubleshoot basic configuration/script issues

 - Attend requirements review and validation sessions as needed

 - Participate in SCRUM calls

 - Utilize strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Stay on time and on task with assigned customer work

Who you are:

 - Live in and authorized to work in EMEA

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or related field

 - Development experience with JS or ServiceNow

 - Experience working with ITOM products is a plus

 - Experience in Cloud-Native implementations of Discovery, ServiceMapping, AIOps is a plus.

 - Experience/willingness working on multiple projects simultaneously

 - Self-Learner and eager to understand new technologies

Compensation:

 - Base Salary: £120,000-£150,000 annually, depending on experience

Benefits

 - Generous and competitive private healthcare coverage (country dependent) 

 - Unlimited Paid Time Off (4-week minimum) (Vacation, Sick & Public Holidays)

 - Family Leave (Maternity, Paternity)

 - Fitness Subsidies 

 

RapDev is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.

source_jobs.title: Senior Solutions Engineer (Pre-Sales)
source_jobs.description:
About RapDev:

RapDev builds the operational backbone for autonomous IT. More than 1,000 enterprises run ServiceNow and Datadog better because of us — trusted data, connected workflows, and AI that resolves incidents instead of just reporting them.

On the ServiceNow side of our business, we specialize in modern ITOM, ITAM, AI, SPM, and DevOps implementations designed to help organizations engineer their ServiceNow into a powerful AI-driven platform. And on the Datadog side of our business, our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity for organizations looking to drive measurable business impact through their Datadog environment.

About the Job

RapDev is seeking a highly skilled pre-sales Solutions Engineer to join our ServiceNow Sales team. In this role, you will be responsible for providing technical expertise and guidance to customers and prospects, helping them understand and utilize the full range of RapDev’s services to maximize the value of their ServiceNow platform. You will work closely with the sales team, customers, and technical staff to propose, design and demonstrate solutions that meet each customer's unique needs, using a deep understanding of out-of-the-box behaviors and of customizations to drive maximum value.

What You'll Do:

 - Collaborate with the sales team to identify and qualify new opportunities and develop a deep understanding of customer needs

 - Conduct in-depth technical presentations and demonstrate unique expertise in achieving the value of ServiceNow’s solutions in production and at scale

 - Design and propose customized solutions that leverage ServiceNow’s products and RapDev services to meet customer needs

 - Lead technical discussions with customers and prospects, answering questions and providing guidance on technical features, functionality, and integration

 - Conduct hands-on proof of concept testing and product evaluations to demonstrate the value of ServiceNow's solutions

 - Develop technical content and collateral to support sales and marketing initiatives

 - Act as a subject matter expert on ServiceNow’s solutions and stay up-to-date on industry trends and competitive offerings

 - Continuously learn and improve technical knowledge of ServiceNow and supporting technologies

 - Work collaboratively with the sales, marketing, and engineering teams to ensure successful customer outcomes

Who You Are:

 - 5+ years of experience in a pre-sales or a similar technical sales role, preferably in the software industry

 - Hands-on experience with ServiceNow solutions and a strong understanding of use cases and value propositions

 - Knowledge of, or willingness and ability to develop knowledge of, ServiceNow ITSM, ITOM, ITAM, SecOps, and core platform capabilities (CMDB, Integration Hub, Automation Hub, etc.)

 - Technical capabilities in areas such as Cloud Engineering/SRE, Application and Infrastructure configuration and maintenance, Application Development/SDLC

 - Excellent presentation and communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts to a non-technical audience

 - Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think creatively to develop customized solutions

 - Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects and priorities

 - Strong collaboration and team-oriented mindset

 - Commitment to ongoing learning and professional development

Compensation:

 - Base Salary: $130,000-$180,000 annually, depending on experience, plus uncapped commission potential 

Benefits

 - 100% Employee Healthcare Coverage (Medical, Dental & Vision)

 - Retirement Plan (5% 401k Match, IRA)

 - Unlimited Paid Time Off (4-week minimum) (Vacation, Sick & Public Holidays)

 - Family Leave (Maternity, Paternity)

 - Hybrid Work Opportunities

 - Fitness & Commuter Subsidies available

 - Equity

 - Relocation Assistance

 - SL & LT Disability

RapDev is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed

This is a unique opportunity to work with the ServiceNow platform as well as AWS, GCP, Azure, Jenkins, Github, QA tools, and more!

 - Design highly scalable, testable code

 - Troubleshoot basic configuration/script issues

 - Participate in SCRUM calls

 - Utilize strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Stay on time and on task with assigned customer work

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or related field

 - 5+ years of development experience with JS or ServiceNow

 - Experience working with ITOM products is a plus

 - Experience in Cloud-Native implementations of Discovery, ServiceMapping, AIOps is a plus.

 - Experience/willingness working on multiple projects simultaneously

 - Self-Learner and eager to understand new technologies

Compensation: 

 - Base Salary: $65,000-$135,000 annually, depending on experience 

Benefits

 - 100% Employee Healthcare Coverage (Medical, Dental & Vision)

source_jobs.title: ServiceNow Tech Lead
source_jobs.description:
About RapDev:

RapDev builds the operational backbone for autonomous IT. More than 1,000 enterprises run ServiceNow and Datadog better because of us — trusted data, connected workflows, and AI that resolves incidents instead of just reporting them.

On the ServiceNow side of our business, we specialize in modern ITOM, ITAM, AI, SPM, and DevOps implementations designed to help organizations engineer their ServiceNow into a powerful AI-driven platform. And on the Datadog side of our business, our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity for organizations looking to drive measurable business impact through their Datadog environment.

About the Job

Are you interested in solving complex problems for large enterprise ServiceNow customers? We're looking for engineers who are passionate about integrating the latest technologies with the ServiceNow platform. This is a unique opportunity to work with the latest ServiceNow modules as well as AWS, GCP, Azure, Github, AI tools, and more!

What you'll do:

 - Develop quality software and web applications

 - Analyze and maintain existing software applications

 - Design highly scalable, testable code

 - Discover and fix programming bugs

 - 3rd party integration development (REST, SOAP, mid servers, etc)

 - Write/create custom business rules, client scripts, script includes, UI policies, ACL’s, UI scripts

 - Work independently with customers on implementations and remote services

 - Troubleshoot basic configuration/script issues

 - Attend requirements review and validation sessions as needed

 - Participate in SCRUM calls

 - Utilize strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Stay on time and on task with assigned customer work

Who you are:

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or related field

 - 5+ years of ServiceNow development experience

 - Proficient in scripting and integrations on ServiceNow

 - Experience leading ITOM implementations

 - Experience in Cloud-Native implementations of Discovery, ServiceMapping, AIOps

 - Experience/willingness working on multiple projects simultaneously

 - Self-Learner and eager to understand new technologies
   

Compensation:

 - Base Pay: $150,000–$200,000, depending on experience

Benefits

 - 100% Employee Healthcare Coverage (Medical, Dental & Vision)

 - Retirement Plan (5% 401k Match, IRA)

 - Unlimited Paid Time Off (4-week minimum) (Vacation, Sick & Public Holidays)

 - Family Leave (Maternity, Paternity)

 - Hybrid Work Opportunities

 - Fitness & Commuter Subsidies available

 - Equity (without a vesting period)

 - Relocation Assistance

 - SL & LT Disability

 - Visa Sponsorship

RapDev is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.

source_jobs.title: Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
About RapDev:

RapDev builds the operational backbone for autonomous IT. More than 1,000 enterprises run ServiceNow and Datadog better because of us — trusted data, connected workflows, and AI that resolves incidents instead of just reporting them.

On the ServiceNow side of our business, we specialize in modern ITOM, ITAM, AI, SPM, and DevOps implementations designed to help organizations engineer their ServiceNow into a powerful AI-driven platform. And on the Datadog side of our business, our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity for organizations looking to drive measurable business impact through their Datadog environment.

RapDev specializes in modern ITOM & DevOps ServiceNow delivery and implementations as well as integrations and services for Datadog. Our experienced team of SREs and DevOps engineers powerfully brings together these two ecosystems to drive better observability, availability, and deployment velocity across your organization.

If the roles that we are hiring for do not seem like a fit but you are interested in RapDev, please apply to our Talent Pool to stay in the loop! We will keep your application on file, and will reach out if a new role seems like a fit.

RapDev is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.
